scope_done: compiler/cli/build_nvptx.hexa edited: 2 import lines + _build_hand_mir_vec_add() + _build_nvptx_stub_ptx now wraps codegen_emit_ptx_sm80
F-RFC055-CPU-CODEGEN-UNTOUCHED held (no edit to nvptx_target.hexa or x86_64_linux/arm64_darwin)
scope_deferred: Runtime substring verification (the four PTX markers .visible .entry / .param .u64 quartet / ld.global.f64 / st.global.f64) — requires building the compiler tree with HEXA_BACKEND=native module-loader import. Smoke driver (/tmp/rfc071_p2_1/p2_1_smoke.hexa) parse-gates clean but the existing 'hexa build' link path fails on pre-existing 624-duplicate-symbol error reproducible on stock nvptx_vec_add_test.hexa as well — environment/runtime double-link issue independent of this edit.
Per g_commit_push_deploy: a follow-on session must rebuild hexa_cli_driver/hexa_v2 with the linker double-link resolved before runtime substring assert can run.

expected_emitted_ptx_excerpt_design.comment: Expected output shape of `codegen_emit_ptx_sm80(_build_hand_mir_vec_add())` based on the canonical MModule pattern shared with compiler/codegen/nvptx_lower_test.hexa::_build_case_load_store (proven by that test's substring asserts in 055-P3b), plus the GPU_KIND_KERNEL partition path verified by Case 6 (_build_case_partition) of the same file.
directives: // [P2.1 real codegen PTX -- RFC 071 P2.1 MIR -> PTX via codegen_emit_ptx_sm80]

substring_check_table.reason: GPU_KIND_KERNEL partition path emits .visible .entry — proven by nvptx_lower_test.hexa Case 6 (line 574 check).
Kernel partition param-bank pass renders MFunc.params[i] as .param .u64 <name>_param_<i> — proven by nvptx_lower_test.hexa Case 6 (line 577).
Same pass, i=2 (STMT_STORE address Local — also Pass-2 propagated to .u64 bank for %rd register).
STMT_LOAD generic lowering emits ld.global.f64 %fd<dst>, [%rd<addr>] — proven by nvptx_lower_test.hexa Case 5 (line 518).
STMT_STORE generic lowering emits st.global.f64 [%rd<addr>], %fd<val> — proven by nvptx_lower_test.hexa Case 5 (line 523).

what_this_fire_proves: compiler/cli/build_nvptx.hexa now imports MIR + nvptx_target modules.
_build_nvptx_stub_ptx body is no longer a string-concat constant; it invokes the real codegen pipeline.
Parse-gate is clean — syntactic edit is valid hexa.
what_this_fire_does_NOT_prove: Runtime execution of codegen_emit_ptx_sm80(_build_hand_mir_vec_add()) — blocked by pre-existing 624-symbol duplicate-link issue in current build path (reproducible against stock nvptx_vec_add_test.hexa). Resolution requires hexa_cli_driver / hexa_v2 rebuild in a separate session with runtime double-link fixed.
F-RFC071-MIR-DRIVER-INVOKE PASS verdict — design-PASS only; runtime-PASS deferred until linker-rebuild closes the bootstrap gap.

gpu_md_section_2a_paragraph: UPDATED — see GPU.md §2a 'Update 2026-05-21 (RFC 071 P2.1 LANDED)' paragraph.
next_session_action: Rebuild hexa_cli_driver with linker double-link fix, then run /tmp/rfc071_p2_1/p2_1_smoke.hexa for runtime substring assert; flip F-RFC071-MIR-DRIVER-INVOKE row note to RUNTIME-PASS.
